description: A designed official quote-card graphic on a solid blue gradient background. At the top-center is a circular headshot of a smiling woman with long dark hair in a dark blazer over a white top, posed in front of an American flag. The center holds a large white serif pull-quote framed by light-blue quotation marks: 'Since Jan. 20, HSI has arrested more than 1,000 illegal workers and proposed over $1 million in fines against businesses that exploit and hire illegal workers.' Beneath it an attribution reads '— MADISON SHEAHAN, ICE Deputy Director'. The lower-right corner bears the DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark. Visual style: clean, corporate, official agency template (blue brand color, serif quote, circular portrait, seal). Messaging/propaganda technique: an authority/leadership quote citing enforcement statistics to project record-breaking worksite enforcement ('FIRST 100 DAYS: Protecting American Business'). Target audience: general public, employers, and immigration-restriction supporters.
notable_text: Since Jan. 20, HSI has arrested more than 1,000 illegal workers and proposed over $1 million in fines against businesses that exploit and hire illegal workers.; MADISON SHEAHAN, ICE Deputy Director
